question_title: Will INTC's market close price on 2026-03-12 be higher than its market close price on 2026-03-03?
summary: INTC is currently ~16.7% below its 52-week high of $54.60, trading around $45.50. The 7-trading-day horizon (Mar 3 to Mar 12) is essentially a coin flip with a very slight negative tilt from recent momentum. The conditional drawdown base rate (50.5%, n=776) is nearly neutral. Monte Carlo simulations using recent 20-day volatility give ~46% positive, while full-sample stats give ~52%. The blended estimate is ~49.5%. No strong directional catalyst was identified in news searches.

factors.description: Conditional drawdown base rate: when INTC is >=15% below 52-week high, 50.5% chance of positive 7-day return (n=776)
Recent 20-day negative drift: mean daily return of -0.11%, suggesting continued selling pressure
Monte Carlo with full sample stats: 51.6% positive, slightly positive mean daily return overall
Post-spike (Feb 24 +5.7%) base rate: 52.2% positive over 10 days, slight positive tendency
S&P 500 roughly flat over past month, neutral market environment
Stock has recovered only 17.5% of its drawdown from peak, weak bounce so far

reasoning:
**Forecast: 49% probability that INTC closes higher on March 12 than March 3.**

Key findings:
- INTC is ~16.7% below its 52-week high ($54.60), currently at ~$45.50
- The empirical conditional base rate for 7-day positive returns when in a ≥15% drawdown is **50.5%** (n=776 events) — essentially a coin flip
- Monte Carlo with recent 20-day stats (which show negative drift of -0.11%/day) gives **46%** positive; full-sample gives **52%**
- A +5.7% spike on Feb 24 historically leads to 52.2% positive forward returns over 10 days
- No major news catalyst identified that would push the stock strongly in either direction
- The broader market (S&P 500) has been roughly flat, providing no directional tailwind or headwind

This is a genuinely uncertain scenario near 50/50, with a very slight negative tilt from recent selling momentum.
sources_consulted: [Intel Corporation (INTC) Stock Price, News, Quote & History - Yahoo Finance](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/INTC/)
